findings.description: The source file contains 15 main sections as listed in its table of contents (from `how_to_get_data_from_excel` through `how_to_change_test_data_dir`). This knowledge file covers only 4 of them (s1–s4). The remaining 11 sections beginning with `how_to_numbering_sequence` are absent. The `--s1` file ID suffix suggests intentional splitting into multiple knowledge files, but the coverage scope should be verified to confirm a sibling `--s2` file (or more) covers sections 5–15.
findings.source_evidence: RST table of contents lists 15 entries: how_to_get_data_from_excel, how_to_run_the_same_test, tips_groupId, how_to_fix_date, how_to_numbering_sequence, using_ThreadContext, using_TestDataParser, using_junit_annotation, using_transactions, using_ohter_class, how_to_assert_property_from_excel, tips_test_data, how_to_express_empty_line, how_to_change_master_data, how_to_change_test_data_dir
